params.section: Earners' levy deducted on earnings up to an annually prescribed maximum

params.anchor: NZD $20,000 for each year, if you are studying for 1 year or more, or

params.section: Any person, whatever their age, who is employed by an employer to do any work for hire or reward under a ‘contract of service’ (commonly called an ‘employment agreement’).

params.heading: Republic of Korea – Working Holiday
params.anchor: be between the ages of 18 and 35 (inclusive)

params.heading: République de Corée — Vacances-travail
params.anchor: être âgé de 18 à 35 ans, inclusivement

params.heading: Republic of Korea – Working Holiday
params.anchor: Description: The Working Holiday category is designed for citizens of the Republic of Korea who intend to travel in Canada and who wish to find temporary paid employment to help pay for their trip (up to 24 months per participation).

params.heading: République de Corée — Vacances-travail
params.anchor: Description : La catégorie Vacances-travail est conçue pour les citoyens de la République de Corée qui envisagent de voyager au Canada et qui souhaitent trouver un emploi temporaire rémunéré pour les aider à payer leur voyage (jusqu’à 24 mois par participation).

rowLabels: Your applicationThis amount includes the processing fee and the right of permanent residence fee.

params.section: Find out if you need to give biometrics.

headers: For the part of the taxpayer's working holiday taxable income that:

params.heading: What is the tax-free threshold
params.anchor: The tax-free threshold is the amount of income you can earn before you pay tax. Most Australian residents can claim tax-free threshold on the first $18,200 of the income they earn in the income year.

params.tableTitle: Tax rates for resident taxpayers for the 2026-27 year of income

params.anchor: The rate of levy payable by a person upon a taxable income is 2%.

headers: Super guarantee (%) for Norfolk Island (transitional rate) (from 1 July 2016)

params.sectionTitle: Amount of the Low Income tax offset

params.anchor: From 1 July 2026, passport holders from Cyprus, Finland, Germany, and Republic of Korea passport holders are eligible to apply for a Working Holiday (subclass 417) visa if they are 18 to 35 years of age (inclusive).
